title: Progression Reimagined
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b80c70f12b94c61595b099daed10dda96ec82bee.png)A rethink and extension of minecrafts progression, mainly provided by [Progression Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/progression-reborn), [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite) and [Enderite Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderite-mod)

The idea was to extend the midgame before the huge jump to diamond, and extend the endgame with advanced netherite. It should taek significanmtly longer to run out of new upgrades to make and collect

The pack also contains [Yung's](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG) suite of "better" mods for structures and [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) to add some variation and freshnes to structures, alongside [Enderscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape) to give the end more of a purpose post game

This is my first mod pack so 
a) go easy on me
b) any and all constructive criticism is welcomed and appreciated

Other notable mods:
- [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
- [Enchanting Infuser](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchanting-infuser)
- The "more variants" series by [LieOnLion](https://modrinth.com/user/LieOnLion)
- [Vanilla Refresh](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vanilla-refresh)
- [Complimentary Reimagined Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
